summary: Replaced the WriteStore source-note invalid-stage fallback with localized, resolution-guided copy that names the valid stages for conversion.

localized_key.english_value: Move the note to Capture, Permanent Note, or Archived first, then try again.

store_change: WriteStore.turnIntoSourceNote now sets String(localized: "write.error.note.sourceConversion.invalidStage") when transition to Source Note is invalid.

locale_coverage.native_review_claim_for_new_key: Not claimed. Each new review row has native_review.accepted=false and pending_native_review=true.
locale_coverage.prior_native_review_scope_preserved: The prior project-owner-reported native/fluent review remains scoped to the 419 entries present before 2026-05-20; each return file now records 9 pending post-packet additions across the two error-message fix slices.

diff_budget.reason: The slice required one key across 19 Localizable.strings files plus 18 per-locale review return files. The queue cap was expanded rather than leaving locale parity or provenance incomplete.

scope_boundaries: Did not change WritingStageRules or any source-note transition behavior.
Did not touch PatternStore failure visibility or copy.
Did not touch DesignSystem audio/voice accessibility error labels.
Did not claim native/fluent review for the new non-English strings.

validation.make automation-check: passed (pyright 0 errors / 0 warnings; localization-review-drift-check 0 drift; 93 automation tests)
